name: complianceCheck
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.framework === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.status === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (AuditActionPanel.callMacro channel: runDomain('audit','complianceCheck',{input:{artifact:{data}}}) peeled at dispatch). Validates records[].fields against rules[] (required/pattern/range/crossRef/enum). overallComplianceRate = mean of per-record rates. Result card renders framework/complianceRate/totalRequirements/metRequirements/status/gaps[].{requirement,severity,remediation} EXACTLY (the prior overallComplianceRate/totalRules/totalViolations/fieldGaps/ruleEffectiveness/recordResults fields were NOT what the card read → every compliance card was blank; fixed 2026-06-28; the originals are retained for the parity test + provenance). metRequirements = rules with zero violations; status = >=95 compliant / >=80 partial / else non-compliant; framework defaults to 'Custom'. No fake data — empty records/rules return an honest empty-shape message.
